blocked_tasks.reason: Requires AWS credentials and an active AWS account to run bootstrap.sh. Manual step.
Requires T-A-01 completion and AWS credentials to run terraform init with backend config.
Requires filing an AWS Support ticket to exit SES sandbox. Manual 24-48h process.
Requires Apple Developer .p8 key upload and FCM server key — manual steps blocked by Apple/Google account KYC.
Requires a live EKS cluster (AWS credentials + T-A-02 apply). Cannot run without AWS account.
Requires live RDS + EKS cluster.
Requires live EKS + Amazon MQ + Celery workers.
Requires live SES identity + AWS credentials.
Requires live SNS platform application + physical test device + Apple/Google accounts.
Requires live EKS cluster to create access entries.
Requires live EXPO_TOKEN and EAS project setup.
Requires live EKS cluster + ECR images.
ECR repo provisioning blocked on AWS credentials.

k6 load test environment setup requires live staging environment at production parity (EKS + RDS + Redis all deployed). Blocked on AWS credentials (T-A-01/T-A-02). k6 scripts are written (loadtest/*.js); execution requires deployed infrastructure.
Container hardening audit requires live Docker images built for all 19 services. Services have Dockerfile skeletons; full Dockerfiles require implementation of each service's app code.
Secrets rotation drill requires live AWS Secrets Manager with populated secrets. Blocked on AWS credentials.
Pen-test vendor engagement requires budget approval (procurement decision) + vendor selection process. Cannot be automated. Timeline: RFP to 3 vendors → select → SOW sign → 2-week test window.
Pen-test findings remediation requires completed pen-test (T-016). Unknown scope until test is complete.
Production capacity reservation requires live AWS account + EKS cluster to set HPA parameters and request EC2/NAT/ALB quota increases.
TestFlight external track setup requires Apple Developer enrollment + App Store Connect submission. Blocked on Apple account KYC.
Play Alpha track setup requires Google Play Console enrollment + submission. Blocked on Google Play KYC.
Actual beta recruitment (sending invites, Typeform responses) requires live app builds on TestFlight/Play Alpha. Blocked on T-023/T-024.
Statuspage.io account creation + component configuration requires Statuspage.io account signup and billing plan. Manual step; config documented in docs/ops/status-page-config.yaml.
PagerDuty org creation + engineer onboarding requires PagerDuty account. Manual step; policy documented in docs/runbooks/.
Full load test sign-off run requires live staging at production parity. Blocked on T-001/T-019.
Security sign-off requires all SAST/CVE scan results + pen-test retest completion. Blocked on T-016/T-017.
iOS App Store submission requires Apple Developer account + production build. Blocked on Apple KYC.
Android Play Store submission requires Google Play Console account + production build. Blocked on Google KYC.
Beta completion report requires 4-week beta to complete. Blocked on T-023/T-024/T-025.

phase_8_pending.description: Phase 8 (Completion) — public launch readiness gate. Requires all Phase 7 blocked tasks to be unblocked by the operator (AWS account, vendor sign-ups, Apple/Google developer enrollment, pen-test vendor). No code work remains in pipeline; all blocked items are human/external-gated.
gate_criteria: All 7 launch gates in docs/beta/launch-criteria.md show APPROVED
All vendor accounts active (Stripe, RevenueCat, Persona, Sentry, PostHog)
iOS app approved by Apple Review
Android app approved by Google Play Review
100 beta users onboarded with 80%+ onboarding completion
Security sign-off: zero HIGH/CRITICAL open findings
Load test sign-off: all 5 k6 scenarios green

execution_settings.backend: Python FastAPI microservices (20 services) on AWS EKS
